name: Speckled Pouf Ottoman Speckled Beige- Room Essentials™
description:
Bring extra visual interest to your interior decor with the Speckled Pouf Ottoman from Room Essentials™. This beige ottoman is round and covered with a speckled pattern for a delightful look that complements your existing decor or dorm furniture. Designed with a soft fabric upholstery, this pouf ottoman is comfortable for resting your feet.


Room Essentials™: Everyday Value

Overall Width : 16" Inches
Overall Depth : 16" Inches
Overall Height : 16" Inches
